system.flavor: You ignite a spark of divine energy.
system.effect:
Zone a zone of scintillating dark or light energy down in free space in range. It can be placed over characters.
• Dark entire space is obscured and difficult terrain.
• Light that start or end their turn in the area gain brand. Allies that either start or end their turn there may clear 1 negative status, then save, ending one more on a success.
